productDisplayName: Baggit Women Knotty Taj Brown Handbag
description: A practical and stylish choice of bag from baggit. Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth leather effect fabric and smart handles will give a sophisticated look to any outfit. Height: 15 cm Width: 20 cm Depth: 9.5 cm Made of textured leather for durability Two corduroy knotted handles Two upraised zippered compartments One main zippered compartment with a zippered pocket A foldable flap with a hidden magnetic closure securing a zippered pocket A zippered pocket at the back Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
